# force-settings.global-settings.pixel-clock.name:

# force-settings.global-settings.pause-before-first.type: constant-height-pause
# force-settings.global-settings.pause-before-first.identifier.type: standard
# force-settings.global-settings.pause-before-first.identifier.name: pause-forcerobot300
